_meta.title: Tomsgarden rename map
_meta._legalNote: Game MECHANICS are not copyrightable, so a mechanically identical clone is permissible. However, specific NAMES, themes, logos, and ART are protected by trademark/copyright. Every public-facing name and asset must use the original Tomsgarden vocabulary below — never the source game's component names. Do not reuse trademarked art; commission/generate original art only. The internal `rules.json` uses neutral source terms for clarity; this map translates them to the ship-able Tomsgarden names.
_meta.theme: Tom's backyard garden — plants, beds, and garden ornaments.

patterns._note: Source patterns (tree/bird/butterfly/flower/...) renamed to Tom's-garden plant/critter motifs. Values unchanged.

colors._note: Six colors renamed to garden-bed plant names. Keep palettes original; do not copy source art hues exactly if they are distinctive trade dress.
